## Checklist

- [ ] EMOJI_BAN: No emojis in output.
- [ ] DB_FIRST: Changes are persisted to Mnemosyne Axis stores.
- [ ] VENV_ISOLATION: All tests and scripts run within the project's .venv.
- [ ] 14-AXIS: Axis mappings are consistent with AGENTS.md.

- [ ] Security: No secrets or absolute paths exposed.
